rules_owner_consistency.name: rules_owner_consistency
rules_owner_consistency.value:
("auto_revoke"."rules"."type" = 'subscription' AND "auto_revoke"."rules"."subscription_id" IS NOT NULL AND "auto_revoke"."rules"."address" IS NULL)
        OR ("auto_revoke"."rules"."type" = 'address' AND "auto_revoke"."rules"."subscription_id" IS NULL AND "auto_revoke"."rules"."address" IS NOT NULL)
